category_sources: source_facts.description says it checks schema validity and signature of XML documents; official Shibboleth docs describe xmlsectool as validating well-formedness, schema validity, and signatures.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xmlsectool; official Shibboleth documentation uses xmlsectool/xmlsectool v4.
docs_sources: Official Shibboleth Confluence xmlsectool v4 overview is the current documentation surface for stable xmlsectool 4.x.
repo_sources: Official Shibboleth xmlsectool v4 Developer Notes list Git Repository: https://git.shibboleth.net/git/xmlsectool.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Shibboleth docs describe XML signature/schema validation and signing; Shibboleth context supports SAML metadata usage.
